title: Pearl White Balloons, 50 PCS 12 Inch Double Stuffed Pearl Sand White Balloons with Thick Ivory Latex Balloon for Wedding Engagement Baby Shower Bridal Birthday Anniversary Party Decorations Supplies
features: Double Stuffed Pearl Balloons Set: This Pearl Balloons kit includes 50 high-quality 12-inch balloons in four colors: pearl sand white latex balloons, matte white latex balloons, double-stuffed pearl color latex balloons, and double-stuffed pearl Ivory latex balloons, plus a ribbon. It’s perfect for decorating bachelorette, girls women birthdays, weddings, and bridal shower parties, adding a vibrant touch to any celebration

Premium Quality and Safety: Made from durable, non-toxic latex, these balloons are designed to last throughout your event. They’re resistant to bursting and safe for children. Whether filled with air or helium, they maintain their shape and color, ensuring a long-lasting decoration

Easy to Set Up: With included a ribbon, setting up is simple and quick. Inflate the balloons, arrange them, and use the tools to secure them in place. Create stunning balloon displays with minimal effort, making your event look professional and effortless

Ideal for Any Occasion: This versatile balloon set is great for anniversary, birthdays party and bachelorette party decorations. The elegant color scheme of double stuffed pearl and sand balloons, double stuffed pearl and white balloons, white balloons and thick pearl balloons works for both modern and classic themes, perfect for indoor or outdoor parties

Tips for Use and Safety: Inflate the balloons to 80%-90% capacity to prevent bursting. Keep balloons away from sharp objects, heat, and sunlight. Always supervise children, as uninflated balloons can be a choking hazard
